allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r[''id''], r[''status''], r[''conclusion''], r[''name''], r[''created_at'']\) for r in data.get\(''workflow_runs'',[]\)]")

Bash(node -e "let d=''''; process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); r.workflow_runs?.forEach\(w=>console.log\(w.id, w.status, w.conclusion, w.name, w.created_at\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''''; process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); r.jobs?.forEach\(j=>{console.log\(''JOB:'', j.name, j.status, j.conclusion\); j.steps?.forEach\(s=>console.log\(''  STEP:'', s.name, s.status, s.conclusion\)\)}\)}\)")
